title: Total Workflow Usage
description: Total number of rounds in which each workflow was used.

title: Workflow Distribution in Main Rounds
description: Share of selected workflows in rounds 5–7.

title: Workflow Transitions R4 to R5
description: Workflow transition counts from round 4 to round 5.

title: Workflow Transitions R5 to R6
description: Workflow transition counts from round 5 to round 6.

title: Workflow Transitions R6 to R7
description: Workflow transition counts from round 6 to round 7.

title: Final Workflow Ranking Overview
description: Distribution of final workflow rankings and average rank per workflow.

title: Participant Satisfaction by Workflow
description: Mean participant-reported satisfaction ratings on a 1–5 scale after each writing round by workflow.

title: AI Collaboration Experience over Rounds
description: Mean participant ratings on a 1–5 scale for AI understanding, collaboration quality, creativity support, and overall AI performance across AI-supported rounds.

title: NASA-TLX Subscale Ratings by Workflow
description: Mean NASA-TLX subscale ratings on a 1–21 scale across workflows.

title: Composite Quality over Rounds
description: Mean externally rated composite poem quality score per round on a 1–5 scale, aggregated from Fluency, Theme Alignment, Meaningfulness, Poeticness, and Overall Quality scores.

title: Poem Evaluation Dimensions by Workflow
description: Mean poem evaluation scores by workflow on a 1–5 scale, across the dimensions Fluency, Theme Alignment, Meaningfulness, Poeticness, and Overall Quality.

title: Composite Quality vs Time Scatterplot
description: Relationship between completion time and composite poem quality score on a 1–5 scale. Reported completion times include pauses recorded during the writing process.

title: Composite Quality Efficiency by Workflow
description: Mean externally rated composite poem quality score on a 1-5 scale per minute by workflow.

title: Best Rated Poem(s)
description: Poem text for all outputs with the highest mean quality score.

title: Worst Rated Poem(s)
description: Poem text for all outputs with the lowest mean quality score.

title: Constraint Fulfillment over Rounds
description: Mean constraint fulfillment percentage per round, with round 5 marked as the injected-error round.

title: Passed Constraint Rate by Workflow
description: Percentage of rounds that passed the task constraints.

title: Round-5 Workflow and Error Exposure
description: Participants were exposed to the AI error only if their round-5 workflow used AI support.

title: Line-Count Error by Round
description: Line-count constraint error rate across rounds for AI-supported workflows.

title: Post-Error Workflow Choices by Error Exposure
description: Distribution of workflow choices in rounds 6–7, split by whether participants were exposed to the AI error in round 5.

title: NASA-TLX Ratings over Rounds (Error-exposed)
description: Mean NASA-TLX subscale ratings on a 1–21 scale over rounds for the error-exposed group.

title: NASA-TLX Ratings over Rounds (Not exposed)
description: Mean NASA-TLX subscale ratings on a 1–21 scale over rounds for the not exposed group.

title: Participant Age Distribution
description: Age distribution of study participants grouped into age intervals.

title: Participant Gender Distribution
description: Participant distribution by participant gender distribution shown as percentages.

title: Participant Education Distribution
description: Participant distribution by participant education distribution shown as percentages.

title: Participant Native Language Distribution
description: Participant distribution by participant native language distribution shown as percentages.

title: Participant English Level Distribution
description: Participant distribution by participant english level distribution shown as percentages.

title: Participant Writing Confidence and AI Attitudes
description: Mean ratings for writing confidence and attitudes toward AI.
